KHAS Team Receives ISSN International Best Researcher Award

The International Research Awards panel, organized by ISSN Awards in collaboration with the World Research Council, awarded our students Sena Kıvrak and İrem Kara and faculty members Assoc. Prof. Dr. Bengü Özuğur Uysal and Prof. Dr. Önder Pekcan with the International Best Researcher Award in the field of “Polymer Composites” for their research titled “Tungsten disulfide (WS2) doped polyacrylamide (PAAm) composites: Gelation and optical studies“ were awarded the International Best Researcher Award in the field of ”Polymer Composites”.

ISSN recognizes researchers and research organizations worldwide who have achieved outstanding achievements and have made a significant contribution to the advancement of their field, thus having a positive impact on our society.
